title: Inventory Management: A company wants to maintain an ending inventory of 0.2...
summary: Calculate required ending inventory as a percentage of the next quarter's budgeted sales.
prompt: A company wants to maintain an ending inventory of 20% of the next quarter’s budgeted sales volume. If the budgeted sales volume for the next quarter is 50,000 units, what should the ending inventory be for the current quarter?
solution: Ending Inventory = 20% * 50,000 = 10,000 units. This calculation is important for inventory management (Page 51).
